summary: Comprehensive testing of FaceConnect app - Backend API: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI: All core features working - Registration, Login, Friends page, User search, Create Menu with Post/Story/Reel/Live/AI options, Post creation, Friend request sending.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlays and blocks Friends and Settings buttons on mobile viewport - requires force=True click or direct URL navigation

issues: The 'Made with Emergent' badge at bottom-right intercepts pointer events on BottomNav buttons (Friends, Settings)
WebSocket connection warning (WebSocket closed before established) appears in console - expected in test env

passed_tests: Backend: User registration creates user and returns token
Backend: Get current user profile with token
Backend: Short query returns empty results
UI: BottomNav visible with Home, Chat, Friends, Settings, FAB buttons
UI: FAB (+) button opens Create Menu modal
UI: Create Menu shows 5 options (Post, Story, Reel, Live, AI)
UI: Post creation form with Gallery/Camera options and textarea
UI: Post creation submits successfully (toast: 'Post created!')
UI: Friends page loads with search input
UI: User search returns results with Add buttons
UI: Friend request sent successfully (toast: 'Friend request sent!')
action_items: Consider adjusting z-index of 'Made with Emergent' badge or BottomNav to prevent click interception on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: Auth flow implementation is solid with proper token handling
Friends API correctly handles send/accept/decline/remove flows
User search endpoint now working correctly (route conflict was fixed)
Create Menu properly implements 5 options with distinct colors/icons
Post creation flow with media upload option works well
BottomNav has proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All features work, minor overlay issue on mobile)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed users and friends for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FaceConnect app fully functional. All requested features tested: Registration, Login, Friends page with search and friend requests, Create Menu with Post/Story/Reel/Live/AI options, Post creation. Backend API at /api/* routes. Frontend uses JWT token auth stored in context. The 'Made with Emergent' badge can block BottomNav buttons on mobile - use force=True clicks or direct URL navigation. Test users created with TEST_ prefix in database.
